title: Cross-validated feature-subset search with base-variable exclusion groups
summary: Ladder-beam subset search scored by pooled test log-likelihood across pre-split folds. Column names sharing a prefix before `_._` are treated as at-most-one.
description: Discovers fold subdirectories under `folds_dir` (each with `train.csv` + `test.csv`), loads them once, and runs a beam ladder over feature subsets. Each candidate's score is the sum over folds of the LDA test log-likelihood fitted on that fold's training data. Columns whose names split on `base_var_sep` into the same prefix are grouped and constrained to at-most-one per subset. Emits a single started / finished event pair.
usage:
[["model-dfa::cv-search-finalize"]]
folds_dir = "<dir>"
run_dir = "<dir>"
run_name = "dfa_cv_search"
y_col = "y"
# optional:
k_min = 1
k_max = 8
beam_width = 25
step_top_n = 10
base_var_sep = "_._"
use_exclusion_groups = true

arguments.name: run_name
arguments.description: Short identifier for this run. Must not contain path separators or '..'.

arguments.name: y_col
arguments.description: Name or 1-based index of the class-label column. Labels must be exactly 1..=K on each fold.

arguments.name: x_cols
arguments.description: Comma-separated specifier picking which columns to use as features. Default: all columns except y_col.

arguments.name: headers
arguments.description: Whether the fold CSVs have header rows.

arguments.name: k_max
arguments.description: Largest subset size to evaluate. Defaults to the number of eligible features (`p`).

arguments.name: beam_width
arguments.description: Beam width carried between ladder steps.

arguments.name: step_top_n
arguments.description: Top-N children retained per parent at each ladder step.

arguments.name: local_improve
arguments.description: Apply a local 1-swap refinement to each beam candidate.

arguments.name: base_var_sep
arguments.description: Separator that splits a column name into its base variable prefix. Columns sharing a prefix are grouped as at-most-one.

arguments.name: use_exclusion_groups
arguments.description: If false, disable `_._` grouping and allow any combination of columns.

arguments.name: threads
arguments.description: Number of Rayon worker threads used to run the ladder search across folds in parallel. Each fold performs an independent beam-ladder subset search. `1` (default) runs folds serially. Results are deterministic under a given `random_seed` regardless of thread count.

details:
Each candidate subset is evaluated by fitting LDA on every fold's training rows and summing `sum_i log P(y_i | x_i)` on that fold's test rows — the pooled test log-likelihood. Pre-loading every fold lets the beam ladder focus on the fit+score path without CSV I/O. The ladder anchors at the midpoint of `[k_min, k_max]`, descends toward `k_min` and ascends toward `k_max` with a frontier of up to `beam_width` candidates, keeping the best `step_top_n` children at each step. With `local_improve = true` each child is improved by a local 1-swap.

Base-variable grouping: column names are split on `base_var_sep` (default `_._`). Columns whose prefix matches another column's are grouped and the ladder enforces at-most-one selection per group. Disable with `use_exclusion_groups = false` when column names don't follow the `{base}_._{level}` convention.
value:
On success, `{run_dir}/ocinfo/{run_name}_dfa/` contains:

- `{run_name}_dfa_cv_search_summary.csv` — one row per k with the best subset found (rank, k, pooled_test_llh, mean_test_llh_per_row, item indices/names, scenario_id).
- `{run_name}_dfa_cv_search_summary.json` — same rows plus per-fold test LLH and hit-rate, and ladder diagnostics.
- `{run_name}_dfa_cv_search_report.xlsx` — `top_subsets`, `best_coefficients` (refit on the first fold's training data, best-effort), `exclusion_groups`, and `run_info` sheets.

The primary xlsx is also copied to `{run_dir}/{run_name}_dfa_cv_search.xlsx`.
notes: Subsets whose induced pooled covariance is singular on any fold are silently assigned `-inf` and are pruned from the ladder.
The `best_coefficients` sheet is refitted on the first fold's training rows only; re-run `fit-finalize` on the full dataset for production coefficients.
All folds must share identical `x_names` (after `x_cols` selection). Mismatched column names across folds are rejected up front.

see_also.description: Ladder-beam subset search on a single CSV (in-sample LLH).
Cross-validated LDA fit on a fixed feature set.

examples.title: CV search without the _._ at-most-one rule
examples.body:
[["model-dfa::cv-search-finalize"]]
folds_dir = "./folds"
run_dir = "./runs"
run_name = "pilot_cv_search_flat"
y_col = "y"
use_exclusion_groups = false

fields.name: y_col
fields.description: Name or 1-based index of the class-label column.

fields.name: step_top_n
fields.description: Top-N children retained per parent at each ladder step.

fields.name: threads
fields.description: Rayon worker threads for parallel per-fold search. Default: 1.
